title: IIOS Capability JWS Protected Header
description: The DECODED shape of a capability's JWS Protected Header (RFC 7515 section 4). On the wire this JSON object is RFC 8785 canonicalized where applicable, Base64URL-encoded without padding, and forms the first segment of the JWS Compact Serialization token in governance/schemas/capability-token.schema.json. There is no JWS Unprotected Header in this profile.

alg.description: The fully-specified JOSE algorithm identifier for Ed25519 (RFC 9864), not the polymorphic 'EdDSA' identifier. This is the ONLY value ever valid for new IIOS capability issuance; the verifier allowlist contains exactly this one value. See docs/ADR/ADR-0011-GOVERNANCE-MVP-OWNER-DECISIONS.md — Capability envelope format.

kid.description: Identifies which Ed25519 signing key was used. Mandatory protected-header parameter — never an external/unprotected field. Single active signer during MVP; see docs/ADR/ADR-0011-GOVERNANCE-MVP-OWNER-DECISIONS.md — Key custody.

typ.description: Identifies this token type, mandatory protected-header parameter.
